RTL-SDR

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?sdr ?name WHERE {
  ?sdr rdfs:label 'RTL-SDR' @en ; rdfs:label ?name .
  FILTER(LANG(?name) = 'en')
}
```
